summary: Tested Attendance Tab in CineBoard and Financial Overview in Dashboard for CineWorld Studio's. All backend APIs return correct data. Frontend displays data correctly after waiting for API response.
passed_tests: GET /api/cineboard/attendance response has top_now_playing, top_all_time, global_stats
GET /api/cineboard/attendance global_stats has total_films_in_theaters, total_cinemas_showing, total_current_attendance, avg_attendance_per_cinema
GET /api/statistics/my has financial fields (total_spent, total_earned, profit_loss)
GET /api/statistics/my has basic stats (total_films, total_revenue, total_likes)
CineBoard Attendance tab displays Global Stats
CineBoard Attendance tab displays Top 20 Now Playing
CineBoard Attendance tab displays Top 20 All-Time

cineboard_attendance_tab.details: Tab shows Global Stats (17 Films, 1,671 Cinemas, 264,741 Viewers, 158 Avg) and Top 20 rankings with film posters, cinema count, and viewer count.

dashboard_financial_overview.details: Dashboard shows Financial Overview with Spent ($0.00M), Earned ($0.00M), and Profit/Loss (+$0.00M) sections with breakdown for Film and Infra costs.

dashboard_pending_revenue.details: Dashboard shows Pending Revenue section with Film: $0, Infra: $0, Total: $0 and Collect All button.

attendance_api.details: API returns proper structure with global_stats, top_now_playing (20 films with rankings), and top_all_time lists.

statistics_api.details: API returns financial data including total_spent, total_earned, profit_loss, total_film_costs, total_infra_costs, total_infra_revenue.

films_my_api.details: API returns 200 and list of user's films (testuser2 has no films, returns empty list).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Attendance tab, Financial Overview, Pending Revenue all verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing testuser2@example.com (has no films, so stats show 0). Attendance data is populated by APScheduler from other users' films.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CineBoard Attendance tab and Dashboard Financial Overview features are fully functional. The scheduler_tasks.py (update_film_attendance) populates attendance data every 10 minutes. Test user testuser2@example.com has no films, so financial stats show $0 - this is expected behavior.
